meaning: n.(战争的)爆发,(疾病的)发作
examples: The area was struck by an outbreak of cholera.
His death set in motion a train of events that led to the outbreak of war.
He was interned as an enemy alien at the outbreak of the Second World War.
With the outbreak of World War I the reputation of the Germanic gnome plummeted.
An outbreak of polio this year among Angola's internal refugees has affected at least 1, 000 people.
